positive: A highly stylized, vibrant geometric jungle scene, featuring exotic leaves, stylized hummingbirds in flight, and geometric floral patterns. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, designed as a repeating pattern or standalone textile print. Style is retro-minimalist tropical Art Deco meets abstract pop art. Use bold, high-contrast colors (emerald green, sapphire blue, sunset orange, mustard yellow) with clean, crisp outlines and silhouettes. The elements should have strong, flat color blocking and a thick, graphic vector aesthetic. Perfect for placement on apparel. Flat lighting, zero shadows, clean composition, vector art, high contrast.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, low quality, grain, messy, dirty, real photo, 3d render, messy details, bad anatomy
